_comment: Asset manifest for the OLED panel emulator. Edit this file to declare real graphics assets from the repo.

screen._comment: Physical OLED resolution. Firmware renders to a 64x128 portrait canvas then rotates 90°/270° before sending to hardware.

assets.name: placeholder_animation
assets.notes: Built-in placeholder (solid black + solid white). Replace with real animation via scripts/gif-convert.py. Each frame = 8-byte palette + 1360-byte pixel data (160x68, 1bpp horizontal MSB).

_external_assets_example._doc: The cat, dog/Luna, crystal, spaceman and pokemon frames live in the external module 'zmk-nice-oled' (github.com/Ruttiger/zmk-nice-oled, branch panel_editions_ssd1306_fix). They are NOT present in this repo. To use them:
_external_assets_example._step1: Clone the module: git clone -b panel_editions_ssd1306_fix https://github.com/Ruttiger/zmk-nice-oled ../zmk-nice-oled

_example.name: cat_animation
_example.notes: Right-half peripheral cat animation, 8 frames. Actual dimensions TBD from source file.

_example.name: luna_idle
_example.notes: Left-half central dog idle frame 1, pre-rotated 90° for portrait canvas.
